chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference No.194 of 2005 The Commissioner of Income Tax Versus Masood Tariq Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. Dated: 10.04.2023 None present. -.-.- This Income Tax Reference is pending since 2005 and the applicant and his counsel has never bothered to have it fixed even once. It was lastly fixed by the office on 13.03.2023 when no one turned up on behalf of the applicant to proceed with the matter. Today position is same. Income Tax Reference as such is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge
